sql_array: CREATE TABLE data_sources (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), cost FLOAT, last_updated TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO data_sources VALUES (1, 'Source A', 12.5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO data_sources VALUES (2, 'Source B', NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO data_sources VALUES (3, 'Source C', -5.3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT VD_STATISTICS('DSN_1') WHERE (cost IS NOT NULL) && EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM data_sources WHERE name = 'Source A');
SELECT VD_STATISTICS('DSN_3') WHERE (0 >= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_sources WHERE cost < 0) && (SELECT MAX(cost) FROM data_sources));
UPDATE data_sources SET cost = cost + 1 WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM data_sources WHERE name = 'Source B' LIMIT 1) && cost IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(cost) OVER (PARTITION BY name) AS average_cost FROM data_sources WHERE (cost >= 0) && (cost IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE additional_sources (source_id INT, service_name VARCHAR(255), connection_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO additional_sources VALUES (1, 'Service A', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT VD_STATISTICS('DSN_4') WHERE (SELECT SUM(source_id) FROM additional_sources WHERE service_name IS NOT NULL) > 0 && (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM data_sources WHERE cost IS NULL));
SELECT VD_STATISTICS('DSN_5') WHERE (name LIKE '%A%' && (cost IS NULL || cost < 0));
SELECT * FROM data_sources WHERE (cost BETWEEN 0 AND 10) && (name NOT LIKE 'Source %' OR name IS NULL);
